name: Fumewyrm
description: A serpentine dragon that breathes toxic miasma. Weakest body, most devious tactics.

moves.name: 💉 Venom Fang
moves.desc: A quick bite loaded with neurotoxin. High poison chance.

moves.name: 🩸 Venom Drain
moves.desc: Injects venom and siphons HP back. May poison.

moves.name: 😵 Miasma Cloud
moves.desc: Breathes a disorienting cloud of fumes.

moves.name: ⚔️ Tail Swipe
moves.desc: A powerful sweep of the scaled tail. May cause flinch.

moves.name: 🌫️ Smoke Shroud
moves.desc: Obscures the field in thick smoke. Lowers enemy accuracy.

moves.name: 🧪 Acid Spray
moves.desc: Spits a corrosive stream. May burn on contact.

moves.name: 💊 Wyrm Mend
moves.desc: Coils and draws in ambient toxins to regenerate.

moves.name: 📈 Speed Coil
moves.desc: Tightens coils and springs into a faster stance. Speed rises.
